extortion.description: www.aihealth.vn https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/469493-83#overview https://provider.aihealth.vn/ Provider of online medical services intended to assist in finding personal doctors, booking appointments, and buying medication online. The company's platform allows individuals to find their specialist for healthcare advice, opt for health check-up programs, and receive medicines right at home with the assistance of the online pharmacy network and provides tools for making home healthcare nursing appointments, enabling users to avail themselves of a range of medical services sitting at home.
